text.title: Greenfield Infra Decision Matrix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: list constraints + apply red-flags before scoring
score with up-front weights + per-cell rationale
re-score with current capabilities; flag if migration warranted
skip-this-methodology — write ADR for the existing choice instead

example.note: Decision phase? → matches branch "phase == constraint_gather" → conclusion ref=r2-red-flags-disqualifying
